_comment: Generated 2026-05-29 against docs/mvp/engine/02_regime_engine_specification.md v2.1 §6.1 + §8 + docs/mvp/platform/07_api_contract_response_schema.md §26. D1 enactment: signal taxonomy regenerated to canonical 11-signal registry (was the iter-3 placeholder taxonomy). D2 enactment already in methodology.json v1.0.1 (band HOSTILE 0-2 / DEFENSIVE 3-5). BTC structural signals locked to the confirmed 2026-04-30 monthly close per §5.1 (next valid update May 31); weekly signals (MAC, REL, ETF) anchored at the confirmed 2026-05-22 Friday close. data_status carries the same 7-source list as apps/web/data/market/data-status.json (audit gate). _translation_status sibling block flags non-EN content drafted by engineering (machine-draft) pending professional translator pass per market-editorial.md §5.

en.short: Conditions have shifted to Defensive. Bitcoin's long-term trend is intact but the intermediate structure has weakened, macro headwinds persist, and spot ETF flows turned net-negative across the past two weeks.
en.detailed: The environment moved into the Defensive band as Bitcoin closed April below its 20-month EMA and spot ETF flows reversed across recent weeks. The long-term 50-month SMA still holds and monthly RSI ticked higher month-over-month, so the underlying trend has not broken — but US 10-year yields remain elevated, the dollar is firm, and Bitcoin is underperforming both gold and the Nasdaq on a 20-week basis. The pattern reads as a calm pause that calls for caution, not as a confirmed downtrend. The structural read is as of the April 30 monthly close per the engine's confirmed-candle rule; the next monthly re-evaluation is the May 31 close.
key_supportive_factors: Bitcoin remains above its 50-month SMA — long-term structural trend intact
Monthly RSI ticked higher month-over-month — momentum stabilizing rather than continuing to deteriorate
Global liquidity (M2) continued to expand modestly through April
Nasdaq structural health remains supportive — broader risk appetite has not broken
key_headwinds: Bitcoin closed April below its 20-month EMA, breaking intermediate structure
Monthly Stoch-RSI %K remains deeply oversold below the threshold — short-term momentum has not yet lifted
Spot ETF flows are net-negative across the most recent two weeks
US 10-year yields remain elevated above their 20-week trend
Bitcoin is underperforming both gold and the Nasdaq on a 20-week basis

pt-BR.short: As condições passaram para Defensiva. A tendência de longo prazo do Bitcoin segue intacta, mas a estrutura intermediária enfraqueceu, ventos contrários macroeconômicos persistem e os fluxos para ETFs à vista ficaram negativos nas duas últimas semanas.
pt-BR.detailed: O ambiente passou para a faixa Defensiva à medida que o Bitcoin fechou abril abaixo de sua EMA de 20 meses e os fluxos para ETFs à vista reverteram nas últimas semanas. A SMA de longo prazo de 50 meses ainda se sustenta e o RSI mensal subiu mês a mês, então a tendência subjacente não foi rompida — mas os rendimentos do Tesouro americano de 10 anos seguem elevados, o dólar está firme e o Bitcoin está ficando para trás tanto do ouro quanto do Nasdaq em base de 20 semanas. O padrão sugere uma pausa calma que pede cautela, não uma queda confirmada. A leitura estrutural reflete o fechamento mensal de 30 de abril conforme a regra de candle confirmado do engine; a próxima reavaliação mensal será no fechamento de 31 de maio.
key_supportive_factors: O Bitcoin permanece acima da SMA de 50 meses — tendência estrutural de longo prazo intacta
O RSI mensal subiu mês a mês — momentum se estabilizando em vez de continuar deteriorando
A liquidez global (M2) continuou se expandindo modestamente até abril
A saúde estrutural do Nasdaq segue favorável — o apetite por risco em geral não foi rompido
key_headwinds: O Bitcoin fechou abril abaixo da EMA de 20 meses, rompendo a estrutura intermediária
O %K do Stoch-RSI mensal segue profundamente sobrevendido abaixo do limite — o momentum de curto prazo ainda não reagiu
Os fluxos para ETFs à vista estão negativos nas duas últimas semanas
Os rendimentos do Tesouro americano de 10 anos seguem elevados acima da tendência de 20 semanas
O Bitcoin está perdendo tanto para o ouro quanto para o Nasdaq em base de 20 semanas

es.short: Las condiciones pasaron a Defensiva. La tendencia de largo plazo del Bitcoin sigue intacta, pero la estructura intermedia se debilitó, los vientos en contra macroeconómicos persisten y los flujos hacia ETFs al contado se tornaron netos negativos en las últimas dos semanas.
es.detailed: El entorno se movió a la banda Defensiva al cerrar Bitcoin abril por debajo de su EMA de 20 meses y revertirse los flujos hacia ETFs al contado en las últimas semanas. La SMA de largo plazo de 50 meses todavía aguanta y el RSI mensual subió mes a mes, por lo que la tendencia subyacente no se ha roto — pero los rendimientos del Tesoro estadounidense a 10 años siguen elevados, el dólar se mantiene firme y Bitcoin está perdiendo frente al oro y al Nasdaq en base de 20 semanas. El patrón sugiere una pausa serena que invita a cautela, no una caída confirmada. La lectura estructural refleja el cierre mensual del 30 de abril según la regla de vela confirmada del motor; la próxima reevaluación mensual será en el cierre del 31 de mayo.
key_supportive_factors: Bitcoin se mantiene por encima de su SMA de 50 meses — tendencia estructural de largo plazo intacta
El RSI mensual subió mes a mes — el momentum se estabiliza en lugar de seguir deteriorándose
La liquidez global (M2) continuó expandiéndose moderadamente hasta abril
La salud estructural del Nasdaq sigue favorable — el apetito por riesgo amplio no se ha roto
key_headwinds: Bitcoin cerró abril por debajo de la EMA de 20 meses, rompiendo la estructura intermedia
El %K del Stoch-RSI mensual sigue profundamente sobrevendido bajo el umbral — el momentum de corto plazo aún no ha reaccionado
Los flujos hacia ETFs al contado son netos negativos en las dos últimas semanas
Los rendimientos del Tesoro estadounidense a 10 años siguen elevados sobre su tendencia de 20 semanas
Bitcoin está perdiendo frente al oro y al Nasdaq en base de 20 semanas

de.short: Die Bedingungen sind defensiv geworden. Bitcoins langfristiger Trend bleibt intakt, doch die mittelfristige Struktur hat sich abgeschwächt, makroökonomische Gegenwinde halten an, und die Zuflüsse in Spot-ETFs sind in den letzten beiden Wochen netto negativ geworden.
de.detailed: Das Umfeld ist in die Defensiv-Bandbreite gewechselt, da Bitcoin den April unterhalb seiner 20-Monats-EMA schloss und sich die Zuflüsse in Spot-ETFs in den letzten Wochen umkehrten. Die langfristige 50-Monats-SMA hält noch und der monatliche RSI stieg im Monatsvergleich, der zugrundeliegende Trend ist also nicht gebrochen — aber die US-10-Jahres-Renditen bleiben erhöht, der Dollar zeigt sich fest, und Bitcoin liegt sowohl gegenüber Gold als auch gegenüber dem Nasdaq auf 20-Wochen-Sicht zurück. Das Muster wirkt wie eine ruhige Pause, die Vorsicht nahelegt — kein bestätigter Abwärtstrend. Die strukturelle Einschätzung spiegelt den Monatsschluss vom 30. April wider gemäß der Regel des bestätigten Kerzenschlusses; die nächste monatliche Neubewertung erfolgt zum Schluss am 31. Mai.
key_supportive_factors: Bitcoin bleibt oberhalb seiner 50-Monats-SMA — der langfristige strukturelle Trend ist intakt
Der monatliche RSI stieg im Monatsvergleich — das Momentum stabilisiert sich, statt sich weiter zu verschlechtern
Die globale Liquidität (M2) expandierte bis April weiterhin moderat
Die strukturelle Gesundheit des Nasdaq bleibt stützend — die allgemeine Risikobereitschaft ist nicht gebrochen
key_headwinds: Bitcoin schloss April unterhalb der 20-Monats-EMA und durchbrach damit die mittelfristige Struktur
Der %K des monatlichen Stoch-RSI bleibt tief überverkauft unter der Schwelle — das kurzfristige Momentum hat noch nicht aufgenommen
Die Zuflüsse in Spot-ETFs sind in den letzten beiden Wochen netto negativ
Die US-10-Jahres-Renditen bleiben oberhalb ihres 20-Wochen-Trends erhöht
Bitcoin liegt sowohl gegenüber Gold als auch gegenüber dem Nasdaq auf 20-Wochen-Sicht zurück

summary.en: Bitcoin's long-term structure is intact but the intermediate trend has weakened.
summary.pt-BR: A estrutura de longo prazo do Bitcoin está intacta, mas a tendência intermediária enfraqueceu.
summary.es: La estructura de largo plazo de Bitcoin está intacta, pero la tendencia intermedia se debilitó.
summary.de: Bitcoins langfristige Struktur ist intakt, doch der mittelfristige Trend hat sich abgeschwächt.

summary.en: Macro conditions remain restrictive overall, though global liquidity continues to expand.
summary.pt-BR: As condições macro permanecem restritivas no geral, embora a liquidez global siga expandindo.
summary.es: Las condiciones macro siguen restrictivas en general, aunque la liquidez global continúa expandiéndose.
summary.de: Die Makro-Bedingungen bleiben insgesamt restriktiv, auch wenn die globale Liquidität weiter expandiert.

summary.en: Spot ETF flows have turned net-negative across the most recent two weeks.
summary.pt-BR: Os fluxos para ETFs à vista ficaram negativos nas duas últimas semanas.
summary.es: Los flujos hacia ETFs al contado se han tornado netos negativos en las dos últimas semanas.
summary.de: Die Zuflüsse in Spot-ETFs sind in den letzten beiden Wochen netto negativ geworden.

summary.en: Bitcoin is lagging both gold and the Nasdaq on a 20-week basis; broader equity strength persists.
summary.pt-BR: O Bitcoin está perdendo tanto para o ouro quanto para o Nasdaq em base de 20 semanas; a força do mercado acionário em geral persiste.
summary.es: Bitcoin está perdiendo frente al oro y al Nasdaq en base de 20 semanas; la fortaleza más amplia de la renta variable persiste.
summary.de: Bitcoin liegt sowohl gegenüber Gold als auch gegenüber dem Nasdaq auf 20-Wochen-Sicht zurück; die breitere Aktienmarktstärke hält an.

sources.message: BTC monthly price series spliced (CoinMetrics 2010-07 → 2014-08; Yahoo 2014-09 onwards). Authoritative for BTC structural signals (BTC-01..04); last confirmed monthly close April 30, 2026 per doc 02 §5.1. Next update due at May 31 monthly close.
Trade-weighted broad-dollar index used per doc 02 §9 (DXY proxy; license-free alternative to ICE DXY).
Monthly liquidity series; April 2026 reading is the latest available release. Next monthly release expected mid-May (typical FRED M2SL cadence).

Methodology drift D-gold-2026-05-29: spec primary FRED GOLDAMGBD228NLBM (LBMA AM fix) and GOLDPMGBD228NLBM (LBMA PM fix) both returned 404 — FRED retired the LBMA series. Yahoo GC=F (front-month gold futures) substituted. Result direction for REL-01 (ratio-vs-EMA-of-self) is robust to the substitute. Replacement canonical source tracked in PENDING_ALL.md 5.29.

PROVISIONAL single-source — CoinGlass /etf/bitcoin daily-flows table browser-rendered via Docker MCP (2026-05-29). SoSoValue cross-check unreachable (Cloudflare-blocked). Spec-canonical Farside manual feed remains the authoritative source per doc 02 §8.3 + doc 06 §6.5 — not used here (bot-blocked, policy forbids evasion). Visible window: trailing ~10 trading days (May 15 — May 29). Of the trailing 4 weekly aggregates anchored at the May 22 confirmed Friday close: week ending May 22 confirmed net-negative (-16.3K BTC, 5/5 days outflows); weeks ending May 15 / May 8 / May 1 not visible on the default page without authenticated access. Current in-progress week (ending May 29) is tracking net-negative (-17.0K BTC through Thu, post-anchor so outside the trailing-4 window). ETF-01 evaluated INACTIVE 0/2 on the directional read across visible data; the more conservative §10.1 UNAVAILABLE read yields identical 0-pt scoring. Canonical Farside acquisition tracked in PENDING_ALL.md 5.28.

_translation_status._comment: Machine-draft flag per market-editorial.md §5. EN is authoritative; pt-BR / es / de were drafted by engineering with research-memo voice (doc 03 §5.2) and the Phase 7 jargon ban (see scripts/check-market-data-jargon.mjs for the banned-terms list). The 'detailed' field carries the highest editorial stakes and is the priority for translator pass before any public-facing launch. The shorter fields (short, factors, headwinds, group summaries) are acceptable as machine-drafts pre-launch.
